description: Update an existing record using set/add/remove field actions expressed by field name.

add_fields.description: Field-name to value mapping for additive updates.
add_fields.title: Add Fields

overwrite_default.description: When true, update actions overwrite fields by default unless an individual action says otherwise.
overwrite_default.title: Overwrite Default

record_id.description: NetHunt record identifier returned by record feeds, search, or create operations.
record_id.title: Record Id

remove_fields.description: Field-name to value mapping for remove actions.
remove_fields.title: Remove Fields

set_fields.description: Field-name to value mapping for overwrite-style updates.
set_fields.title: Set Fields

name: update_record
